intro: 给那些愿意停下来看看猫咪的人。这里收着一些关于猫的照片、瞬间和小备注。
introEn: For anyone willing to pause for a cat. A quiet place for photos, moments, and tiny notes.
emptyDescription: 第一张猫猫照片还没有放进来，等它们慢慢把这个角落占领。
emptyDescriptionEn: The first cat photo has not arrived yet. Give them a little time and they will take over this corner.
